name: Pork Chop and Corn Stuffing Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup, celery, onion, paprika, and stuffing in a 9-inch greased pie plate. Spoon the stuffing mixture into the center of the pork chops arranged over the stuffing. Press lightly into the stuffing.
2. Combine brown sugar and mustard; spread evenly over the chops.
3. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes or until the chops are fork tender.
